title: Caffeine
body:
Caffeine is a modpack containing decent collection of mods, Caffeine is focused on streamlining the game, designed to be simple and not include unnecessary performance or any mod add stuff, while providing a nice experience without ruining the vanilla experience too much, the modpack is on top of [Additive]([https://modrinth.com/modpack/adrenaline](https://modrinth.com/modpack/additive)) so it will run quite well. # 📥 Installation Guide Please be sure to read the section of Sodium's wiki [Driver Compatibility](https://github.com/CaffeineMC/sodium/wiki/Driver-Compatibility) before installing Caffeine. It contains some important notes on how to avoid crashes and other performance issues. You can install the modpack with a third party launchers like [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/), [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app) or [ATLauncher](https://atlauncher.com/). After installing the modpack, you can easily add your favorite mods, resource packs, or shaders as long as they are compatible with the version of Minecraft you are playing! # ⭐ Features ### UI improvements Caffeine will make Minecraft's interface easier and less confusing to play without changing the essence of the game, and will partially try to simulate the basic interface of bedrock and satisfaction with sound mods. so in short Caffeine will replace the game's interface with user-friendly ones to make the game easier to understand. ### A few graphical improvements We focus on capturing a more visually appealing image, with rain effects, the beauty of the other effects, and the effects of the bomb explosion, aiming to achieve this without overly compromising the vanilla appearance. ### Sound enhancements The sounds echos, you can hear the wind blowing and the leaves rustling in the trees, your footsteps make a sound, you can hear the raindrops falling on the roof and you can hear satisfying sounds on the interface. #
[Frog](https://modrinth.com/frog)
